rationale.R1.6: 'Clean this up' applied to a written artifact canonically targets prose quality — sentence-level clarity, word choice, flow, and paragraph cohesion. This is the sole load-bearing R1 responsibility; the delegation says nothing about restructuring arguments, reassessing evidence, or updating citations. R1.5 is set at the boundary (0.3) because minor reordering of sentences within paragraphs may arise incidentally during polish, but wholesale structural reorganization is not requested and therefore R1.5 does not enter the active set.
